Work-To-Do

This is a simple work-to-do template you can use in Brightspace.

Preview

Need-to-Know

This Week’s Focus

  • Read: [enter link or title]
  • Do: [enter tasks]
  • Submit: [enter deadlines]

Copy HTML

Copy everything below:



        <div style="border:1px solid #e5e7eb;border-radius:14px;padding:14px;background:#ffffff;">
  <div style="font-size:14px;letter-spacing:.06em;text-transform:uppercase;color:#6b7280;">Need-to-Know</div>
  <h3 style="margin:6px 0 8px 0;">This Week’s Focus</h3>
  <ul style="margin:0;padding-left:18px;line-height:1.5;">
    <li>Read: [enter link or title]</li>
    <li>Do: [enter tasks]</li>
    <li>Submit: [enter deadlines]</li>
  </ul>
</div>

← Back to catalog
